name: Day Trip: Ouzoud Waterfalls from Marrakech

seo.title: Ouzoud Waterfalls Day Trip from Marrakech — Monkeys & Waterfalls | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private day trip from Marrakech to the Ouzoud Waterfalls (110 m high), the tallest in Morocco. Barbary macaques, boat ride, rainbow.

hero.tagline: Morocco's tallest waterfalls, 2.5 hours from Marrakech

intro: The Ouzoud Waterfalls are the tallest in Morocco, with a 110-metre drop. Located about 150 km northeast of Marrakech, they cascade in several streams amid exceptionally lush scenery. You'll spot wild Barbary macaques, can walk or take a boat to the foot of the falls, and enjoy the permanent rainbows created by the spray.
